summary: Fixed the issue where the background image was zoomed in by replacing 'cover' scaling with 'contain' scaling in the game's rendering draw loop. This ensures that the entire high-fidelity background image is visible regardless of the user's browser or screen aspect ratio. Added dark letterboxing for any dead space to maintain visual quality and clarity. This directly addresses the reviewer feedback that the background image was zoomed in.

risks.description: Letterboxing will exist for screen aspect ratios that do not match the image, typically seen as dark bars on the top/bottom or sides.
risks.mitigation: Used a dark slate color that fits the game's overall aesthetic for the letterbox color.

manual_validation.check: Verify that the full background image is visible in the game across various browser window sizes and aspect ratios.
